community.headline: More than a marketplace — an active community
community.body: ActivLife Hub connects organizers and participants who share a passion for getting out and doing more, together.

audience.headline: Two ways to be part of ActivLife Hub
audience.subheadline: Join activities as a participant, or get certified to organize and earn. Start in the right place.

beginner.title: New to Activity Organization
beginner.description: Start from scratch with a friendly course that walks you through everything you need to host great activities.
features: Module quizzes and a final exam
Monthly subscription to the Organizer Platform

experienced.title: Already an Activity Organizer
experienced.description: Skip the course and prove your expertise with a timed qualification test. Fast-track to certification.
features: Monthly subscription to the Organizer Platform

items.a: Choose a path, complete the Academy course or qualification test, and earn your Certified Organizer certificate.
Once certified, subscribe to Pro, list activities on the marketplace, and accept bookings with secure payouts.
Pick the path below that matches your experience, then continue to payment when you are ready.

onboarding.confidence: You are joining a platform built on certified organizers, secure payments, and clear community standards.
onboarding.flowNote: Choose your organizer path below. Beginner — learn the basics and get certified. Experienced — prove your skills with a short qualification test. After payment, your course or test unlocks automatically.

notCertified.title: Certification Required
notCertified.description: Complete your certification before activating your subscription.

noSubscription.title: Activate Your Organizer Account
noSubscription.description: Subscribe for $9.99/month to unlock the full Organizer Platform: manage activities, receive client requests, and accept bookings.

pastDue.title: Payment Failed
pastDue.description: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep your subscription active.

cancelled.title: Subscription Cancelled
cancelled.description: Your subscription has been cancelled. Resubscribe to regain access to the Organizer Platform.

home.subtitle: Here's an overview of your organizer account.

activities.title: Activities
activities.subtitle: Share what you love — create activities for your community to discover.
activities.emptyDesc: Create your first activity — start simple, you can always edit it later.
activities.confirmDelete: Delete this activity? This cannot be undone.

form.title: Title
form.intro: Start simple — only a title is needed. You can add details and edit anytime.
form.titleHint: Give it a clear, inviting name participants will recognize.
form.descriptionHint: A few sentences on what you’ll do together is plenty.
form.priceHint: Leave empty to offer it for free.
form.statusHint: Drafts stay private. Publish to list it on the marketplace, where participants can discover and book it.
